Sidharth Parihar
AI DEVELOPER

B.Tech, IIT Kanpur // Bitwise Inc. // Kota, India

DOWNLOAD CV

I am Sidharth Parihar — an AI Developer and engineer currently working at Bitwise Inc. in Kota, India. I hold a B.Tech in Bioengineering from IIT Kanpur, and I have spent the years since building systems at the frontier of artificial intelligence. My work spans autonomous agents, voice-enabled applications, and large-scale cloud deployments across Azure and AWS.

EXPERIENCE

Trainee Programmer - DART @ Bitwise Inc
Nov 2024 – Present
Designing scalable Python solutions and architecting on Azure. Building datasets, deploying RAG pipelines, and integrating voice models (Whisper, Deepgram).
B.Tech Bioengineering @ IIT Kanpur
2017 – 2022
Developed a strong analytical foundation for problem-solving in complex systems.

TECHNICAL STACK

PythonC++JavaAWS Bedrock / StrandsAzure AI FoundryDockerRAG / vLLMPostgreSQL

OPEN SOURCE // GITHUB

xsound

Rust-based audio routing engine and interface.

I am an AI developer and engineer based in Kota, India. Trained as a bioengineer at IIT Kanpur, I found my calling at the intersection of intelligent systems and software — building machines that think, speak, and act.

AGENTIC SYSTEMS

01

I design autonomous agents that reason, plan, and execute — systems built to operate independently at scale.

RAG PIPELINES

02

I architect retrieval systems that ground language models in real knowledge — making AI responses precise and trustworthy.

VOICE INTEGRATION

03

I build applications that listen and speak — bringing natural voice interfaces to life using state-of-the-art speech models.

MODEL DISTILLATION

04

I compress intelligence — taking large, powerful models and refining them into lean, production-ready systems.

CLOUD ARCHITECTURE

05

I deploy and orchestrate AI workloads across cloud infrastructure — ensuring they are resilient, scalable, and production-grade.
